tool.name: get_scan_status
tool.description: Get a compressed real-time dashboard of the current scan: hypothesis states, coverage gaps, confirmed findings, cost, iteration count, and recommended next action. Call at the start of major decisions, before reporting, or when context feels stale.

parameter.name: include_recommendations
parameter.description: Whether to include a suggested next action (default: true).

parameter.name: agent_id
parameter.description: Optional agent ID. Omit to auto-resolve from current runtime context.

returns.description: Phase, iteration, hypotheses counts, coverage, cost_usd, and recommended_next action.
